pageContext.name: Stitch
pageContext.description: Get ready for a new addition to the Dynamic 8ction Heroes series! Stitch, the mischievous protagonist of Disney's Lilo & Stitch (also known as Experiment 626), is here with twelve movable joints, interchangeable faces, interchangeable hands, and a variety of Stitch-related accessories. These features let fans play with the Stitch figure and adorn him as they please, whether it's wearing his handsome sunglasses, eating ice cream, or playing his ukulele and singing. His adorable nonsensical behavior makes it hard to put him down. Fans who love Stitch surely won't want to miss this Disney collectible! Sway your body with Stitch and enjoy the Hawaiian vibes.
